scripts.build: npm run build -w @odiumflix/web && npm run build -w @odiumflix/studio && npm run build -w @odiumflix/desktop && npm run build -w @odiumflix/studio-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @odiumflix/web && npm run typecheck -w @odiumflix/studio && npm run typecheck -w @odiumflix/mobile && npm run typecheck -w @odiumflix/studio-mobile
